description: Recommended hooks configuration for Spring Search Tempo
instructions: Add these to ~/.claude/settings.json or use /hooks command

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo 'Running pre-commit checks...'; cd "$PWD" && ./gradlew compileKotlin -q || exit 2; fi; }

python3 -c "import json, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if any(p in path for p in ['application-production.yml', '.env', 'credentials', 'secrets']) else 0)"
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read file; if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.kt$'; then echo "Compiling Kotlin..."; cd "$PWD" && ./gradlew compileKotlin -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; }

PostToolUse.name: Show DB stats after bootRun completes

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'bootRun.*completed\|Job.*COMPLETED'; then echo '📊 Run /db-query to see indexed content stats'; fi; }

UserPromptSubmit.name: Suggest slash commands based on keywords

hooks.command: jq -r '.prompt // ""' | { read prompt; case "$prompt" in *bug*|*error*|*fail*) echo '💡 Tip: Use /fix-bug for systematic debugging';; *entity*|*add*|*create*) echo '💡 Tip: Use /add-entity to scaffold full-stack entities';; *test*) echo '💡 Tip: Use /tdd or /test-module';; esac; exit 0; }
